name: Payment Gateway with Consented Flow Enabled
description: Routed transfer to payment gateway with CONSENTED FLOW ENABLED on source avatar. Tests the isPermittedFlow fix where InsertRouterInTransfers must run BEFORE ValidateConsentedFlow. The Safe trusts the Router at this block (enabled at block 44289356). Uses 4Birthday group tokens.
notes: Source avatar has consented flow enabled (trusts Router). This is the key test for the isPermittedFlow bug fix. Transfer uses existing group tokens rather than minting new ones.
